live_path.role: CLI entrypoint parses --owner and forwards it to the service layer.
Service orchestrator for owner resolution, record creation, routing-key derivation, and payload emission.
Derives effective owner and owner_source from explicit input or config default.
Fallback owner source when --owner is omitted or blank.
Builds the base stored record with name, status, and effective owner only.
Builds routing_key from the already-resolved owner and item name.
Copies the base record and appends owner_source plus routing_key to the emitted payload.

inputs: config/defaults.json::owner when the owner argument is missing or blank
owner_source.not_from_storage: sync_app/store.py::make_record does not write owner_source; sync_app/serializer.py::serialize_payload receives owner_source as an explicit argument.

emission.summary: The emitted payload is assembled after owner resolution and routing-key derivation, not read back from storage as a complete payload.

test_observations.implication: Explicit owner is applied before payload emission and before routing_key is finalized.
The sample explicit-owner and default-owner paths can share the same owner and routing_key because config/defaults.json sets owner to pm-oncall.
CLI parsing forwards --owner into the live service path.
Observed CLI output matches the explicit-owner test path.
Observed CLI output confirms owner_source changes even when owner and routing_key stay the same for this sample.

rejected_decoys.reason: Historical support note is contradicted by live code: owner_source is derived in service, and routing_key is computed after CLI forwarding.
Unfinished draft speculates that storage became the source of truth, but it was never merged and does not match the live path.
Legacy helper is not called by sync_app/service.py::sync_item.
Legacy helper is not called by the live path; the service calls sync_app/serializer.py::build_routing_key.
Draft helper is unused in the live path and does not explain emitted owner_source.
The file explicitly describes future design intent only and cannot override the current implementation.
